Localization.Description: The process changed one of the registry branches responsible for determining the default application used to open files with a specific extension in the system

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The process {subject.process.name} added the {object.new_value} application to the list of programs used to open files with the {datafield11} extension on the host {event_src.host}
The process {subject.process.name} changed the application for the {datafield11} file association on the host {event_src.host}
The process {subject.process.name} installed the default application {object.new_value} for files with the extension {datafield11} on the host {event_src.host}
The process {subject.process.name} set a new file association {object.new_value} for files with the extension {datafield11} on the host {event_src.host}
